metadata.name: Purchase Order (Auto Pay via Actions)
metadata.author: Agreements Protocol
metadata.description: Purchase order where payer signs first, then payee signs. Payment is executed as an on-chain action on the final signature transition.

payerEthAddress.name: Payer Address
payerEthAddress.description: Ethereum address of the paying party

payeeEthAddress.name: Payee Address
payeeEthAddress.description: Ethereum address of the receiving party

workTokenAddress.name: Payment Token (ERC-20) Address
workTokenAddress.description: ERC-20 token contract used for payment

paymentAmount.name: Payment Amount
paymentAmount.description: Amount of tokens to transfer upon final signature

payerName.name: Payer Name
payerName.description: Legal name of the paying party

payeeName.name: Payee Name
payeeName.description: Legal name of the receiving party

effectiveDate.name: Effective Date
effectiveDate.description: The date when this purchase order becomes effective

scope.name: Scope
scope.description: The scope of cooperation between the parties

termDuration.name: Term Duration
termDuration.description: The duration of the purchase order

content.data:
# PURCHASE ORDER AGREEMENT


**THIS PURCHASE ORDER AGREEMENT** (the "Agreement") is made effective upon the date of the final digital signature below, by and between **${variables.payerName}** ("Payer") and **${variables.payeeName}** ("Payee").


## 1. AGREEMENT TO TRANSACT
The Payer agrees to purchase, and the Payee agrees to sell, the goods or services associated with this Order. The Parties acknowledge that this Agreement represents a binding commitment to transact based on the terms set forth herein.


## 2. PAYMENT TERMS AND MECHANISM
**2.1 Purchase Price.** The total consideration for this Order is **${variables.paymentAmount}** denominated in **${variables.workTokenAddress}** (the "Purchase Price").


**2.2 Immediate Payment via TransferFrom.** This Order constitutes a prepaid transaction.
* (a) **Authorization:** The Payer represents and warrants that they have approved the Protocol's Smart Contract to spend an amount of **${variables.workTokenAddress}** equal to or greater than the Purchase Price from the Payer's wallet.
* (b) **Execution and Transfer:** Upon the valid execution of this Agreement by both Parties, the Protocol is irrevocably instructed to execute a `transferFrom` transaction, moving the full Purchase Price directly from the Payer’s wallet to the Payee’s wallet.
* (c) **No Escrow:** The Parties acknowledge that funds are transferred immediately upon signing and are not held in escrow or subject to further release conditions by the Protocol.


## 3. DELIVERY OBLIGATIONS
**3.1 Delivery.** Upon receipt of the Purchase Price, the Payee is obligated to provide the goods or services as agreed between the Parties.


**3.2 Non-Delivery.** Failure to deliver the agreed goods or services after the receipt of the Purchase Price constitutes a material breach of this Agreement, entitling the Payer to seek a full refund and all available legal remedies.


## 4. REPRESENTATIONS AND WARRANTIES
**4.1** Each Party represents that it has the legal authority and capacity to enter into this Agreement.
**4.2** The Payer warrants that the funds used for the Purchase Price are not derived from illegal activities.
**4.3** The Payee warrants that they are the legal owner or authorized provider of the goods or services being sold.


## 5. GENERAL PROVISIONS
**5.1 Electronic Acceptance.** The Parties agree that their cryptographic signatures recorded on the blockchain constitute valid and binding acceptance of this Agreement.
**5.2 Governing Law.** This Agreement shall be governed by the laws applicable to the Payer's jurisdiction unless otherwise specified in a separate master agreement.


**IN WITNESS WHEREOF**, the Parties have executed this Agreement by their cryptographic signatures.

PENDING_TEMPLATE_VARIABLES.name: Pending Template Variables
PENDING_TEMPLATE_VARIABLES.description: Payer needs to fill out the template variables.

AGREEMENT_TERMINATED_WITHOUT_PAYMENT.name: Agreement Terminated Without Payment
AGREEMENT_TERMINATED_WITHOUT_PAYMENT.description: Payee chose not to participate, so the agreement is terminated without payment.

PAYMENT_COMPLETE.name: Payment Complete
PAYMENT_COMPLETE.description: Both parties have signed and payment has been executed.

initialize.name: Initialize Purchase Order
initialize.description: Initialize with party addresses and payment parameters

templateVariables.description: Payer fills in terms, including scope, duration, and effective date.

payerSigning.description: Signature from payer accepting the purchase order terms.

payeeSigning.description: Signature from payee accepting the purchase order terms.

payeeRejection.description: Payee declines to participate in the purchase order.

payeeRejectionReason.name: Rejection Reason
payeeRejectionReason.description: Reason why the payee is declining to participate
